DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.cardsModifierDescriptio: Hermit cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.description:
[gold]Gunslinger[/gold]: A mysterious wanderer who fights from the shadows.
Uses Dead On mechanics, Bruise debuffs, and curse synergy.
DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.eventDeathPrevention: Not yet... I still have unfinished business...
DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.title: The Hermit
DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.unlockText: Play a run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
